option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Menu?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuBar?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToolBar?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.ColumnConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.RowConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.RadioButton?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToggleGroup?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Spinner?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.CheckMenuItem?>
<BorderPane xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="uv.naloge.prva.naloga1.MainViewController" prefHeight="850.0" prefWidth="1400.0">
<!-- FRAME: Top MenuBar and ToolBar --> <top> <VBox BorderPane.alignment="CENTER"> <MenuBar> <menus> <Menu mnemonicParsing="true" text="_File"> <items> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="true" text="_Open" onAction="#onOpen" accelerator="Shortcut+O"/> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="true" text="Clea_r" onAction="#onClear" accelerator="Shortcut+R"/> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="true" text="E_xit" onAction="#onExit" accelerator="Shortcut+Q"/> </items> </Menu> <Menu mnemonicParsing="true" text="_Edit"> <items> <CheckMenuItem fx:id="toggleParticipantNameItem" mnemonicParsing="true" text="_Participant Name" onAction="#onToggleParticipantName" /> <CheckMenuItem fx:id="toggleClassTypeItem" mnemonicParsing="true" text="_Type of Class" onAction="#onToggleClassType" /> <CheckMenuItem fx:id="toggleClassTimeItem" mnemonicParsing="true" text="_Class Time" onAction="#onToggleClassTime" /> </items> </Menu> <Menu mnemonicParsing="true" text="_View"> <items> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="true" text="_Print All" onAction="#onPrintAll" /> </items> </Menu> <Menu mnemonicParsing="true" text="_Help"> <items> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="true" text="_About" /> </items> </Menu> </menus> </MenuBar> <ToolBar prefHeight="40.0"> <items> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Open" onAction="#onOpen" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Clear" onAction="#onClear" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Exit" onAction="#onExit" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Print All" onAction="#onPrintAll" /> </items> </ToolBar> </VBox> </top>
<!-- FRAME: Center containing the Floating Body --> <center> <BorderPane styleClass="floating-body"> <BorderPane.margin> <Insets top="10.0" right="10.0" bottom="10.0" left="10.0"/> </BorderPane.margin>
<center> <VBox spacing="20.0" style="-fx-padding: 20;" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER"> <GridPane vgap="15.0" hgap="15.0"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="NEVER" minWidth="120.0" /> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="ALWAYS" /> </columnConstraints> <rowConstraints> <RowConstraints vgrow="SOMETIMES" /> <RowConstraints vgrow="SOMETIMES" /> <RowConstraints vgrow="SOMETIMES" /> </rowConstraints>
<Label text="Participant Name:" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0" /> <TextField fx:id="participantNameField" disable="true" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="1" />
<Label text="Type of Class:" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="0" /> <TextField fx:id="classTypeField" disable="true" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="1" />
<Label text="Class Time:" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="0" /> <TextField fx:id="classTimeField" disable="true" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="1" /> </GridPane>
<HBox spacing="15.0" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <RadioButton fx:id="registerRadioButton" text="Register Participant" selected="true"> <toggleGroup> <ToggleGroup fx:id="actionToggleGroup"/> </toggleGroup> </RadioButton> <RadioButton fx:id="unregisterRadioButton" text="Unregister Participant" toggleGroup="$actionToggleGroup"/> <RadioButton fx:id="changeReservationRadioButton" text="Change Reservation" toggleGroup="$actionToggleGroup"/> </HBox>
<Button fx:id="executeActionButton" text="Execute Action" onAction="#onExecuteAction" maxWidth="Infinity" />
<HBox spacing="15.0" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="Reservation:" minWidth="-Infinity" /> <ComboBox fx:id="reservationComboBox" maxWidth="Infinity" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Label text="at Position:" minWidth="-Infinity" /> <Spinner fx:id="reservationPositionSpinner" editable="true" prefWidth="80.0" minWidth="-Infinity" /> </HBox>
<TextArea fx:id="mainTextArea" prefHeight="150.0" wrapText="true" />
<Label fx:id="messageLabel" text="Ready" style="-fx-font-style: italic; -fx-text-fill: gray;" /> </VBox> </center> </BorderPane> </center>
<!-- FRAME: Bottom Status Area --> <bottom> <Label fx:id="statusLabel" text="Status: Ready" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="status-label"> <BorderPane.margin> <Insets left="10.0" bottom="5.0" /> </BorderPane.margin> </Label> </bottom>
</BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Menu?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuBar?> <?import javafx.scene.control.MenuItem?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToolBar?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.ColumnConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.RowConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.RadioButton?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ToggleGroup?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Spinner?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextArea?> <?import javafx.scene.control.CheckMenuItem?>
<BorderPane xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="uv.naloge.prvaNaloga.MainViewController" prefHeight="850.0" prefWidth="1400.0">
<!-- FRAME: Top MenuBar and ToolBar --> <top> <VBox BorderPane.alignment="CENTER"> <MenuBar> <menus> <Menu mnemonicParsing="true" text="_File"> <items> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="true" text="_Open" onAction="#onOpen" accelerator="Shortcut+O"/> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="true" text="Clea_r" onAction="#onClear" accelerator="Shortcut+R"/> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="true" text="E_xit" onAction="#onExit" accelerator="Shortcut+Q"/> </items> </Menu> <Menu mnemonicParsing="true" text="_Edit"> <items> <CheckMenuItem fx:id="toggleParticipantNameItem" mnemonicParsing="true" text="_Participant Name" onAction="#onToggleParticipantName" /> <CheckMenuItem fx:id="toggleClassTypeItem" mnemonicParsing="true" text="_Type of Class" onAction="#onToggleClassType" /> <CheckMenuItem fx:id="toggleClassTimeItem" mnemonicParsing="true" text="_Class Time" onAction="#onToggleClassTime" /> </items> </Menu> <Menu mnemonicParsing="true" text="_View"> <items> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="true" text="_Print All" onAction="#onPrintAll" /> </items> </Menu> <Menu mnemonicParsing="true" text="_Help"> <items> <MenuItem mnemonicParsing="true" text="_About" /> </items> </Menu> </menus> </MenuBar> <ToolBar prefHeight="40.0"> <items> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Open" onAction="#onOpen" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Clear" onAction="#onClear" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Exit" onAction="#onExit" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" text="Print All" onAction="#onPrintAll" /> </items> </ToolBar> </VBox> </top>
<!-- FRAME: Center containing the Floating Body --> <center> <BorderPane styleClass="floating-body"> <BorderPane.margin> <Insets top="10.0" right="10.0" bottom="10.0" left="10.0"/> </BorderPane.margin>
<center> <VBox spacing="20.0" style="-fx-padding: 20;" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER"> <GridPane vgap="15.0" hgap="15.0"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="NEVER" minWidth="120.0" /> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="ALWAYS" /> </columnConstraints> <rowConstraints> <RowConstraints vgrow="SOMETIMES" /> <RowConstraints vgrow="SOMETIMES" /> <RowConstraints vgrow="SOMETIMES" /> </rowConstraints>
<Label text="Participant Name:" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="0" /> <TextField fx:id="participantNameField" disable="true" GridPane.rowIndex="0" GridPane.columnIndex="1" />
<Label text="Type of Class:" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="0" /> <TextField fx:id="classTypeField" disable="true" GridPane.rowIndex="1" GridPane.columnIndex="1" />
<Label text="Class Time:" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="0" /> <TextField fx:id="classTimeField" disable="true" GridPane.rowIndex="2" GridPane.columnIndex="1" /> </GridPane>
<HBox spacing="15.0" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <RadioButton fx:id="registerRadioButton" text="Register Participant" selected="true"> <toggleGroup> <ToggleGroup fx:id="actionToggleGroup"/> </toggleGroup> </RadioButton> <RadioButton fx:id="unregisterRadioButton" text="Unregister Participant" toggleGroup="$actionToggleGroup"/> <RadioButton fx:id="changeReservationRadioButton" text="Change Reservation" toggleGroup="$actionToggleGroup"/> </HBox>
<Button fx:id="executeActionButton" text="Execute Action" onAction="#onExecuteAction" maxWidth="Infinity" />
<HBox spacing="15.0" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="Reservation:" minWidth="-Infinity" /> <ComboBox fx:id="reservationComboBox" maxWidth="Infinity" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Label text="at Position:" minWidth="-Infinity" /> <Spinner fx:id="reservationPositionSpinner" editable="true" prefWidth="80.0" minWidth="-Infinity" /> </HBox>
<TextArea fx:id="mainTextArea" prefHeight="150.0" wrapText="true" />
<Label fx:id="messageLabel" text="Ready" style="-fx-font-style: italic; -fx-text-fill: gray;" /> </VBox> </center> </BorderPane> </center>
<!-- FRAME: Bottom Status Area --> <bottom> <Label fx:id="statusLabel" text="Status: Ready" BorderPane.alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="status-label"> <BorderPane.margin> <Insets left="10.0" bottom="5.0" /> </BorderPane.margin> </Label> </bottom>
</BorderPane>
